a: Google Workspace (Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Slides, Google Meet, Google Calendar, Google Drive)

c.d: The ability to facilitate real-time and asynchronous communication among team members through features like chat, messaging, and video conferencing.
Capabilities for creating, assigning, tracking, and managing tasks, including setting deadlines and monitoring progress.
Features for securely sharing and collaborating on files, documents, and other digital assets.
Tools for planning, organizing, and managing projects, including timelines, Gantt charts, and resource allocation.
The capacity to integrate with other applications and services, such as email, CRM, and cloud storage, to streamline workflows.
The intuitiveness and ease of use of the application's interface, affecting user adoption and efficiency.
Functionality that allows multiple users to work on the same document or project simultaneously.
